sessions.summary: Logged INC27451201 progress: CXCDP-38626 502 retry fix deployed to eu5-st1, handed to QA for verification. Moved card from In Progress to Review/Waiting.
accomplishments: Verified actual fix scope by reading idx-cdp git log (not the scheduler bug — the 502 retry handling)
Created CXCDP-38626 and idx-cdp concept notes
Moved INC27451201 to Review/Waiting on the SAP board
Saved feedback memory: verify git log before claiming what a 'merged fix' does

sessions.summary: Resumed mid-flow chub-slack-bot poller fix, ran PM synthesizer (verdict: APPROVED with 6-test blocker), refactored runIterationCycle for DI, added 6 tests + pushed. Bot then went runaway on stale cursors — TL complained — killed bot, ran cs-product-manager who picked Option C (24h stale-cursor floor), shipped fix as 78b1dbb. Bot restarted clean with 2 stale cursors correctly deferred.
accomplishments: Ran pm-report-synthesizer on 5 PM agent reports for poller-starvation-fix — verdict APPROVED with 6-spec-tests as only blocker
Refactored startIterationPoller into testable runIterationCycle with DI bag (fetchTimeline, fetchPRState, handleReReviewTrigger, removePRCursor, checkForNewReplies)
Added explicit removePRCursor call for closed/merged PRs (was silently skipped)
Added 6 vitest tests for poll-loop behavior (all-PRs polled, new-commit fires, cooldown, kill-switch, review_requested priority, closed-PR cleanup) — iterate.test.js grew 15→21 passing
Pushed 4 commits (bbbbb5c, 2b8923b, ad4bb18, 57737fd) to origin/master
TL reported bot reviewing non-stop after fix shipped — killed PID 35900
Diagnosed: 13 stale cursors with reviewed_at days/weeks old were all eligible to fire on first cycle; 5min cooldown didn't help (cursorAge >> 5min); 10min WIP threshold didn't help (commits also old)
cs-product-manager picked Option C — 24h STALE_CURSOR_THRESHOLD_MS floor — over per-cycle cap, reviewed_at reset, and dry-run cycle alternatives
Shipped 78b1dbb: stale guard before intervalMs check, 7th vitest test, spec edge-cases corrected
Bot restarted clean: idx-cdp#26 (30h old) and JourneyService#17 (29h old) deferred with clear log line
Saved feedback memory: poll-loop-data-distribution — check first-cycle behavior against persisted state before shipping

sessions.summary: Diagnosed Jenkins idx-cdp-deployment #1042 EU5-ST1 failure. ServiceNow suggested generic 'review logs / verify staging / validate terraform-vault-consul' checklist; actual cause was Harbor verify-labels gate missing 'WS' label on chart 1.0.2535. Fix is upstream in idx-cdp CI build, not in the deployment pipeline or staging.
accomplishments: Identified root cause from log: `WS not exists in Harbor labels: ['CM', 'ITG']` at validations stage
Pushed back on irrelevant ServiceNow checklist (build logs depth / staging health / terraform-puppet-vault-consul) — none in failure path
Created idx-cdp-deployment concept note + updated idx-cdp Blockers field
Saved feedback memory: read-error-before-running-checklists

sessions.summary: Investigated TEAG INC27569035 — S/4 PUV and Sales and Service v2 Prod connectors intermittently missing from EAC Sources panel while visible as Destinations. Verified backend ingestion healthy (S4ProcessorService processed 175k events for the BU). Identified that connect-service / cdp-eac UI BFF logs are NOT in the cdp-logs Kibana cluster — UI observability lives in a separate stack. Strongest standing hypothesis: Business Area / scope ACL filter applied to /sources but not /destinations endpoint. Filed gap report cdp-investigator-plugin#17 with 6 concrete improvements.
accomplishments: Pulled INC27569035 + CS20260012472088 from ServiceNow; identified the two missing connector names from customer screenshots (S/4 PUV, Sales and Service v2 Prod)
Verified backend healthy — 1.2M log entries for the BU on 2026-05-25, only 13 unrelated WARN/ERROR, S4ProcessorService active with 175k events
Spotted ConfigSinkService activity cluster 09:41-10:11 UTC during the flicker — admin config changes correlate with symptom
Ruled out '0 events = hide' hypothesis using customer's own screenshots (3 zero-event sources still visible)
Confirmed connect-service / cdp-eac / EacService logs absent from cdp-logs across all naming permutations
Filed cdp-investigator-plugin#17 gap report with 6 improvements (connect-service KB, EAC UI flow, routing-table update, observability mapping, R&D handoff template, subagent MCP clarity)
Saved feedback memory: feedback-eac-ui-logs-not-in-cdp-logs — escalate to R&D, don't widen Kibana search
